channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: IC’s new OSINT standards cover open source data, AI services
item.description: As OSINT becomes a major focus for the intelligence community, the new standards give analysts and collectors explicit instructions for citing certain data. The post IC’s new OSINT standards cover open source data, AI services first appeared on Federal News Network.
item.dc:creator: Justin Doubleday, Federal News Network

item.title: AI for chefs: 8 ways LLMs can make restaurant life a bit easier
item.description: Cooking is alchemy, combining two things to create something unexpected. In a way, AI is the same, with unexpected combinations creating new and exciting things. Here’s how alchemists of food and AI can work together, with our eight top tips for chefs interested in AI.
item.dc:creator: Richard Baguley, Fast Company

item.title: Nokia expands data center SONiC support
item.description: Nokia is offering customers an alternative way to set up data center networks by expanding its data center fabric package to support the open-source Software for Open Networking in the Cloud (SONiC).
item.dc:creator: Network World

item.title: How AI orchestration has become more important than the models themselves
item.description: Large language models (LLMs) just keep getting better. In just about two years since OpenAI jolted the news cycle with the introduction of ChatGPT, we’ve already seen the launch and subsequent upgrades of dozens of competing models.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Boosting Cyprus' defense is key so close to the war-wracked Mideast, defense minister says
item.description: NICOSIA, Cyprus (AP) — Bolstering Cyprus ' defense capacity is critical for the east Mediterranean island nation so close to the war-wrecked Middle East, the country's defense minister said Tuesday. The priority for Cyprus is to procure better defense systems, said Defense Minister Vasilis Palmas.
item.dc:creator: MENELAOS HADJICOSTIS, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: Adobe Express is now the default image editor in Box
item.description: Adobe Express is now embedded into Box’s content management application as the default tool for editing images. Express is Adobe’s freemium design app that’s aimed at helping non-designers produce a range of content, such as social media campaign assets, logos or flyers.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Total Quality Logistics: Building a ‘talent destination’ through employee engagement
item.description: Don’t talk about industry slowdowns to Total Quality Logistics (TQL), which has made its largest-ever technology investments over the past three years to bring greater agility and resilience to the business.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: 5 tips for better business value from gen AI
item.description: CIOs have been able to ride the AI hype cycle to bolster investment in their gen AI strategies, but the AI honeymoon may soon be over, as Gartner recently placed gen AI at the peak of inflated expectations, with the “trough of disillusionment” not far behind.
item.dc:creator: CIO

item.title: Reddit rolls out its own AI-powered search tool after cracking down on AI companies
item.description: Reddit has spent the past six months blocking data scrapers from artificial intelligence companies that refused to pay for access to its vast content database. Now, the social media site has rolled out a new tool of its own that utilizes AI to search the site.
item.dc:creator: Chris Morris, Fast Company

item.title: Nvidia's stock dips after China opens probe of the AI chip company for violating anti-monopoly laws
item.description: Shares of Nvidia fell Monday after China said it is investigating the high-flying U.S. microchip company over suspected violations of Chinese anti-monopoly laws.
item.dc:creator: MATT OTT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: How TikTok’s U.S. content creators are bracing for a possible ban in 6 weeks
item.description: American content creators on TikTok asked followers to subscribe to their channels on rival platforms like Meta-owned Instagram and Alphabet’s YouTube after a federal appeals court ruled that the social media app could be banned if it is not sold to a U.S.-based company by Jan. 19.
item.dc:creator: Reuters, Fast Company

item.title: California to consider requiring mental health warnings on social media sites
item.description: SACRAMENTO, Calif. (AP) — California, home to some of the largest technology companies in the world, would be the first U.S. state to require mental health warning labels on social media sites if lawmakers pass a bill introduced Monday.
item.dc:creator: TRÂN NGUYỄN, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Protecting yourself from Microsoft tech support scams
item.description: Tech expert Kurt “CyberGuy" Knutsson says scammers exploit fears, falsely claim computer issues to access your personal data.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Open-Source Frameworks for Large Language Model (LLM) Applications
item.description: Explore four open-source frameworks: Haystack, LangChain, LlamaIndex, and Semantic Kernel for building context-augmented LLM applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: Why AI coding assistants are best for experienced developers
item.description: Generative AI has hit the mainstream with software developers. According to a recent GitHub survey, more than one million developers actively use GitHub Copilot. More importantly, these developers increasingly use AI as “a new building block in developing applications.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: IAEA chief: Iran is poised to 'quite dramatically' increase stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium
item.description: MANAMA, Bahrain (AP) — Iran is poised to “quite dramatically” increase its stockpile of near weapons-grade uranium as it has started cascades of advanced centrifuges, the head of the International Atomic Energy Agency warned Friday.
item.dc:creator: JON GAMBRELL, Associated Press, ABC 4

item.title: OpenAI announces ChatGPT Pro, priced at $200 per month
item.description: The $200 monthly pricing OpenAI has set for a subscription to its recently launched ChatGPT Pro is definitely “surprising,” said Gartner analyst Arun Chandrasekaran on Friday, but at the same time it’s indicative that the company is betting that organizations will ultimately pay more for enhanced A
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Federal appeals court upholds law requiring sale or ban of TikTok in the US
item.description: A federal appeals court panel on Friday unanimously upheld a law that could lead to a ban on TikTok as soon as next month, handing a resounding defeat to the popular social media platform as it fights for its survival in the U.S. The U.S.
item.dc:creator: HALELUYA HADERO, Associated Press, KLAS, CBS News

item.title: ByteDance is about to learn a painful genAI lesson
item.description: When TikTok owner ByteDance discovered recently that an intern had allegedly damaged a large language model (LLM) the intern was assigned to work on, ByteDance sued the intern for more than $1 million worth of damage.
item.dc:creator: Computer World

item.title: Don’t scam yourself with the tricks hackers don’t want me to share
item.description: Cybercriminals are tricking people into compromising their own technology by mimicking trusted sources; here's how to keep yourself safe from these "scam-yourself" attacks.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Better together? Why AWS is unifying data analytics and AI services in SageMaker
item.description: Data warehousing, business intelligence, data analytics, and AI services are all coming together under one roof at Amazon Web Services.
item.dc:creator: Info World

item.title: China's ban on key high-tech materials could have broad impact on industries, economy
item.description: BANGKOK (AP) — China has banned exports of key materials used to make a wide range of products, including smartphones, electric vehicles, radar systems and CT scanners, swiping back at Washington after it expanded export controls to include dozens of Chinese companies that make equipment used to pro
item.dc:creator: ELAINE KURTENBACH, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: From outsider to the Oval Office, bitcoin surges as a new administration embraces crypto
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Born from the ashes of the 2008 global financial crisis, bitcoin arrived after trust had withered in the financial system and in Washington's ability to protect those who must participate in it.
item.dc:creator: STAN CHOE, Associated Press, KREX 5

item.title: Chinese online retailer Temu suspended in Vietnam
item.description: HANOI, Vietnam (AP) — Vietnam has suspended the operations of Chinese online retailer Temu after it failed to meet a government deadline to register the company by the end of November.
item.dc:creator: ANIRUDDHA GHOSAL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Alleged Chinese cyberattack: FBI urges encrypted apps
item.description: Salt Typhoon, a Chinese government-linked hacking group, is one of the largest intelligence breaches in U.S. history.
item.dc:creator: NewsNation Staff, NewsNation
